rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §39.0546, which governs COVID-19 school accountability ratings for the 2021-2022 school year. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 39.0546. COVID-19 RECOVERY ACCOUNTABILITY FOR 2021-2022 SCHOOL YEAR.
_note: Rule text concerns school performance ratings; proposed change concerns property tax exemptions. No conflict.
